name: Badang
intro: Badang, the Tribal Warrior, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Chivalry Fist
abilities.description: CC Damage After every 4 Basic Attacks , Badang's next Basic Attack deals 50 (+30% Extra Physical Attack) to enemies hit and knocks them back . Enemies that are knocked into obstacles will be stunned for 0.6s (minions and creeps are stunned directly). Fist Wind generated by Badang's skills can also trigger this effect. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Displacement Target Displacement; Can interrupt certain skills and Blink or Charge effects (interrupts the same skills as Knock Airborne effect). Including but not limited to Knockback, Drag and effects that pull targets together. Stun Basic level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving, and using Basic Attacks and skills. Can interrupt some skills.

abilities.name: Fist Wind
abilities.description: AOE Slow Badang unleashes a gust of Fist Wind in the target direction, dealing 125–225 (+90% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit, slowing them by 30% for 1.5s, and knocking them back . The Fist Wind will explode upon hitting an obstacle, dealing 100–175 (+60% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies. Fist Wind can trigger attack effects and grants Badang 1 Chivalry Fist stack upon cast. Badang stores up to 2 Fist Wind charges and restores 1 charge every 10.4s. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Attack Effect Both Physical and Magic Basic Attacks can trigger Attack Effects Attack Effects include the "Devour" effect of the Demon Hunter Sword equipment, the 'Weakness Finder" Talent effect, etc.

abilities.name: Fist Break
abilities.description: Mobility CC Badang dashes in the target direction, dealing 230–330 Physical Damage to enemies in his path while gaining a 350–600 shield that lasts 5 seconds. He stops immediately upon hitting an enemy hero, slightly knock back while creating an obstacle that lasts 4 seconds behind them. Enemies hit by the obstacle are dealt 130–180 Physical Damage . Use Again: Badang removes the obstacle he created. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Displacement Target Displacement; Can interrupt certain skills and Blink or Charge effects (interrupts the same skills as Knock Airborne effect). Including but not limited to Knockback, Drag and effects that pull targets together. Cooldown The time needed for casting the skill one more time, which can be affected by CD Reduction (unless otherwise stated).

abilities.name: Fist Crack
abilities.description: Burst AOE Fight to protect and persist for benevolence. Badang throws a flurry of punches in the target direction, dealing 60–120 Physical Damage to enemies hit 9 times over 2.5 seconds (can trigger attack effects). The Fist Wind generated by the punches will explode upon hitting an obstacle, dealing 30–60 Physical Damage to nearby enemies. Badang is immune to control effects for the duration. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Control Immunity You are immune to enemy CC effects (Suppressed excluded) within the duration.
